name: Number 25: Force Focus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>２５ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>重装光学撮影機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フルメタル・フォトグライド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フォーカス・フォース
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Nijūgo Furumetaru Fotoguraido Fōkasu Fōsu
desc:
2 Level 6 monsters
Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card, then target 1 Level 5 or higher Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate the effects of that opponent's face-up monster, until the end of the turn.

eff:

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
